case_title: RONALD WREN ADVERTISING, INC VS. TAGHI REZAIAN

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RONALD WREN ADVERTISING, INC
COPYING FEES (12 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF RONALD WREN ADVERTISING, INC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-07-2010 - CONTINUED TO APR-20-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT'S VENUE CHALLENGE IS GRANTED AS TO PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST MONARCH, DENIED AS TO PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST SF RUGS. THE PARTIES HAVE REACHED A TENTATIVE SETTLEMENT. THE MATTER IS CONTINUED TO APRIL 20, 2010 AT 1:30 PM. IF SETTLED, THEN NO APPEARANCES ARE NEEDED AND THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. IF NO SETTLEMENT, THEN THE PARTIES MUST APPEAR FOR TRIAL OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AS TO SF RUGS. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA HO. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE, SETTLED AS TO DEFENDANT S.F. RUGS. NO APPEARANCES. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
